description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a predominantly white exterior. The structure is composed of multiple rectangular volumes, some of which are cantilevered, creating dynamic overhangs and shaded areas. Large glass windows and sliding doors are present, especially on the ground floor, allowing for ample natural light and visual connection to the outdoors. The property includes a green lawn with a stone path leading to the main entrance, a paved driveway, and a partially enclosed patio or deck area. The flat roof and open terraces further emphasize the contemporary architectural style. The use of contrasting materials, such as wood or dark panels, adds visual interest to the facade.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, white walls, and a mix of green lawn, paved driveway, and open terraces. The design features clean lines, cantilevered sections, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated structure, flat roof, and a sloped green lawn leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, stone path, green lawn, and paved driveway with large windows facing the street.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cantilevered sections, flat roof, and a partially enclosed patio or deck area.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the large windows, open terrace, and a striped deck or patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide glass door, stone path, and minimal overhang, set flush with the facade and adjacent to a paved driveway.
